title: publish + --certify
manager: The `publish` verb ships a complete bundle — the compiled module, its README, its rendered diagrams, and its certificate — to a package registry, with `--certify` running the tier suites first and confirmation gates before anything goes out. This is the culmination of the fleet era: a single command that packages, certifies, and publishes a machine as a first-class, verified artifact wherever it will be consumed, README and proof included.
cs: `publish` (fsl#407) ships the bundle (module + README + renders + certificate) with confirmation gates; `--certify` runs the tier suites first; the fleet-era release verb.
